_comment: CHAMPION v12 on 2b89b33: CANONICAL + #1317 UNTIED zero-init head (tie_embeddings False, +25.7M params, natively supported by canonical -> op4 CANONICAL path, robust; readcal DROPPED as op4-failure suspect) + z-loss 1e-4 + dropout 0.1 (both no-param, training-only) + crown opt (max_lr 8e-4, WSD 45% 1-sqrt, muonWD 0.05, embed 0.006, rope 100k, softcap 30) + best-ckpt.
